title: Locator Bar Removed
description: Disables / removes the locator bar - no locator bar
body:
![locator bar removed datapack/mod title image minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/locator_bar_removed.png)
[![jodeks datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![locator bar removed minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/locator-bar-removed/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
## How it works You only have to run `/reload` once you've installed the datapack/mod, then it works!
